mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_notification WHERE RECIPIENT_USERNAME = #{username} AND IS_READ = 0 AND STATUS = 'SENT'

SELECT NOTIF_NO, NOTIF_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, TARGET_TYPE, MEMBER_ID, REF_NO, RECIPIENT_USERNAME, STATUS, IS_READ, READ_TIME, SEND_TIME, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER FROM tb_notification WHERE RECIPIENT_USERNAME = #{username} AND STATUS = 'SENT' ORDER BY CREATE_TIME DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_notification SET IS_READ = 1, READ_TIME = NOW() WHERE RECIPIENT_USERNAME = #{username} AND IS_READ = 0 AND STATUS = 'SENT'
